programme.title: Naina 1973
programme.desc: A woman becomes the second wife of Ravi, a sophisticated aristocrat. However, she is tormented by constant comparisons with Ravi's deceased first love.

programme.title: Rootha Na Karo
programme.desc: Naina loves Sudhir on the sly, and is jealous of Sudhir's love for Neeta. When Sudhi does not reciprocate her love, she decides to create all kinds of misunderstandings for the two.

programme.title: Saveray Wali Gaadi
programme.desc: Ravidas lives in a village in rural India. He is the son of Chediram who is of highly respected in the village. Ravidas falls in love with Jyoti. Their love becomes known in the village.

programme.title: Insaf Ka Tarazu
programme.desc: Ramesh, a multi-millionaire, falls madly in love with Bharti. In the turnout of events, Bharti kills Ramesh. Watch the heart wrenching drama to know what compels her to take this dire step.

programme.title: Choron Ki Baarat
programme.desc: Anju, a beautiful and spoilt woman, falls in love with a mysterious man, Shekhar. However, with time she realises that he has other motives.

programme.title: Khote Sikkay
programme.desc: An unknown horseback rider is after Jhanga, an evil and troublesome gangster who has terrorised everybody in the village, because he is responsible for his father's death.

programme.title: Dhund
programme.desc: After crashing his car on a foggy night, a man seeks help at a nearby home, where he encounters a dead man and a woman holding a gun. After hearing her sad story, he helps her hide the crime.

programme.title: Naalayak
programme.desc: Laxman has always been the black sheep of the family. He swindles his brother’s money to impress a girl.

programme.title: Aadmi Aur Insaan
programme.desc: Jai and Munish's friendship is ruined when both of them fall in love with the same girl, Meena. Things take a turn when Munish finds out Jai was involved in the case of a faulty railway bridge.

programme.title: Rakhwale
programme.desc: After being imprisoned for a murder he did not commit, a young man breaks out and becomes determined to prove his innocence with some outside help.

programme.title: Apne Rang Hazaar
programme.desc: Sunil, a nonchalant playboy, loves flirting with girls. Soon, his life changes forever when his uncle gets murdered under mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: Ghar Ka Chiraag
programme.desc: A car racer injured and after recovery he find out that the love of his life no longer live. Years later he find out that she is a live and even has a son.

programme.title: Lal Baadshah
programme.desc: Lal Singh lives alongside his mother in a small basti in Mumbai, where Vikram Singh is the don of the city and there is always clash between him and Lal Baadshah.

programme.title: Zamana
programme.desc: Ravi and Vinod's father is killed by a gangster for developing a photo that depicts a crime scene. Ravi, a criminal, and Vinod, a police officer, decide to exact revenge on their father's murderer.

programme.title: Be-Reham
programme.desc: Kumar Anand, an honest police officer, gets into trouble after he accidentally kills a gangster at his ex-lover Mala's house.

programme.title: Choron Ki Baarat
programme.desc: Anju, a beautiful and spoilt woman, falls in love with a mysterious man, Shekhar. However, with time she realises that he has other motives.

programme.title: Khote Sikkay
programme.desc: An unknown horseback rider is after Jhanga, an evil and troublesome gangster who has terrorised everybody in the village, because he is responsible for his father's death.

programme.title: Dhund
programme.desc: After crashing his car on a foggy night, a man seeks help at a nearby home, where he encounters a dead man and a woman holding a gun. After hearing her sad story, he helps her hide the crime.

programme.title: Zamana
programme.desc: Ravi and Vinod's father is killed by a gangster for developing a photo that depicts a crime scene. Ravi, a criminal, and Vinod, a police officer, decide to exact revenge on their father's murderer.
